title: Emergency Evacuation Plan
scenario: Create an emergency evacuation plan for a high-rise building. The plan should include information on evacuation procedures, assembly points, and contact information. It should be easy to read and understand. Keep it under 1000 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is under 1000 words and uses headings and subheadings.
Check if the text is clear, concise, and easy to read.
Check if the text includes the required information on emergency evacuation.
